title: Sign in to your IRCC account: Visiting Canada - Canada.ca
content:
Select the document you applied for to find your account.
Haven’t applied yet? Find out if you need a visa to travel to Canada .
You used one of these accounts to apply for a visitor visa.

### IRCC Portal : Option 1 of 2
You use your email to sign in to this account.

### IRCC secure account : Option 2 of 2
You use your GCKey username and password or your Sign-In Partner credentials to sign in to this account.
If you’re not sure which account you used to apply , try signing in to both or check your email.

## Electronic travel authorization (eTA)

### IRCC secure account : Option 1 of 2
Use the IRCC secure account if we asked you to submit documents for your eTA
                    application.

### eTA status : Option 2 of 2
Use this tool to check if your current eTA is still valid or get updates on pending eTA applications.

## Visitor record (to extend your stay in Canada)
You used the IRCC secure account to apply for a visitor record (to extend your stay in
        Canada).

## Super visa (for parents and grandparents)
You used one of these accounts to apply for a super visa (for parents and grandparents).

### IRCC Portal : Option 1 of 2
You use your email to sign in to this account.

### IRCC secure account : Option 2 of 2
You use your GCKey username and password or your Sign-In Partner credentials to sign in to this account.
Go to IRCC secure account
If you’re not sure which account you used to apply , try signing in to both or check your email.
You used one of these accounts to apply for a transit visa.

### IRCC Portal : Option 1 of 2
You use your email to sign in to this account.

### IRCC secure account : Option 2 of 2
You use your GCKey username and password or your Sign-In Partner credentials to sign in to this account.
Go to IRCC secure account
If you’re not sure which account you used to apply , try signing in to both or check your email.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
